messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-PROBE-burst-1 — OPERATOR BURST PROBE 1/3: approve all three fast to test BL-496 rate-limit retry — safe to ignore
What it solves: Throwaway operator probe 1 of 3 - DO NOT action, promote, or spec.
Approve all THREE of these fast, back to back. With BL-496 live, every one should
strip its buttons and show a verdict line even if Telegram throttles the burst.
The operator deletes all three right after you confirm.
First acceptance signal: After rapidly approving all three burst probes, every one strips its buttons and shows a verdict line (rate-limit retry held)
Approval context: Burst probe 1/3 to prove BL-496's rate-limit retry: approve all three quickly and confirm none are left with live buttons. No real decision needed - deleted after you confirm.
BL-PROBE-burst-1 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-PROBE-burst-1" (or "reject BL-PROBE-burst-1 <reason>") to act.
